CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Plaintiffs Request For Court Judgment On Default Against Defendants
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for Plaintiff's request for entry of default court judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:55:11 a.m. and adjourning at 11:10:33 a.m.

Plaintiff C10 Mission 2390, LLC represented by David Blumenfeld, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Steven J. Sanchez not appearing.

BROOKS BASKIN (Property Manager/Custodian of Records) is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Copy of Lease

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff C10 Mission 2390, LLC. Plaintiff is awarded the following judgment:

1. Damages: $109,900.00
2. Attorney Fees: $10,075.50
3. Costs: $986.00
4. Interest: $19, 625.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $140,586.50

Proposed judgment to be submitted.
